cases.description: Draft with pervasive spelling and grammar errors. Should trigger multiple basic-language findings.
Draft with structural problems: misordered phases, unproven theorem, missing table, weak claim/evidence. Should trigger structure findings.
Draft written in casual, opinionated tone targeting econ-top5. Should trigger venue-alignment findings.
Reasonably well-written academic draft. LLMs will still find structural and rhetorical suggestions, but critical findings should be rare.
